_comment: EDNY DE regression from the Friedrichshafen test flight (2026-06-15): after landing the Tower clears the pilot to taxi to the GAT apron ('rollen Sie zum GAT-Vorfeld ueber Alpha'). The pilot's first-person read-back 'Rolle GAT-Vorfeld ueber Alpha' misses both the READBACK rule ('rollen sie' Tower imperative) and the REQUEST_TAXI_PARKING rule ('rollen zum vorfeld'), so it lands as UNKNOWN and used to bounce off the LM as _INVALID ('Uebermittlung gestoert, wiederholen Sie'). The post-landing adjustment {UNKNOWN, text_contains vorfeld/parking, at_airport_after_landing} -> READBACK now accepts the clearance read-back silently. Driven on the ground from LANDING_CLEARED so at_airport_after_landing stays true.
name: EDNY DE post-landing taxi-to-apron read-back

context.callsign: November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.note: Setup: prime LANDING_CLEARED so the next 'Piste 06 frei' is a genuine post-landing runway-vacated call.
1 - Pilot vacates the runway. Tower-only field: same controller clears the taxi to the GAT apron.
say.text: Piste 06 frei November One Two Three Alpha Bravo

say.note: 2 - Pilot reads the taxi clearance back in first person ('Rolle ... Vorfeld ueber Alpha'). Classified UNKNOWN by the rules, the post-landing adjustment promotes it to READBACK -> silent accept. Before the fix this looped on 'Uebermittlung gestoert, wiederholen Sie'.
say.text: Rolle GAT Vorfeld ueber Alpha November One Two Three Alpha Bravo
